popular.title: Popular service categories
popular.description: Find the right professional in seconds. From everyday fixes to specialist work — all in one place.

howItWorks.title: The Provider → We → Consumer model
howItWorks.description: Skilled providers + our quality layer + happy customers. We handle verification, matching, support, and trust so you don't have to.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Search or browse 200+ services across Dhaka.
howItWorks.s2Desc: We assign the best verified provider for your job and area.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Track, pay, and review — all from one place. Service guarantee included.

why.title: Why Dhaka chooses us
why.description: Built for Bangladesh — local providers, local quality, local support.
why.i1Desc: Every pro passes ID + background checks.
why.i2Desc: Know the price before you book. No surprises.
why.i3Desc: Most jobs are matched within an hour.
why.i4Desc: Bangla-speaking team on call when you need help.
why.i5Desc: Not happy? We re-do or refund. Simple.
why.i6Desc: Honest ratings from real, completed bookings.

featured.title: Top-rated providers in Dhaka
featured.description: Hand-picked, verified pros with consistent 5-star service.

areas.title: Services by area in Dhaka

providerCta.title: Grow your service business with us
providerCta.description: Get a steady stream of verified leads in your area. We handle marketing, booking and support — you focus on doing great work.

finalCta.title: Need a service today?
finalCta.description: Book trusted professionals in Dhaka in minutes. Same-day availability for most categories.

book.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields.

book.nextStep2: A pro accepts and contacts you to confirm timing.
book.nextStep3: Service happens. Pay securely. Rate the experience.
book.needHelpDesc: Call us at +880 1700 000000 or email support@shebabd.com — we're online 9 AM – 9 PM.

contact.title: We're here to help
